name: codex-next
description: Reusable Codex skills for SDLC planning, software delivery, development workflows, research, data work, and office productivity.

interface.shortDescription: A skill-powered upgrade pack for Codex workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex Next packages reusable skills for routing work, researching projects, shaping requirements, designing solutions, planning validation, implementing safely, reviewing changes, and producing delivery-ready artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Next to choose the smallest workflow.
